tax_filing.title: Annual income tax + BAS for GST
tax_filing.summary: Annual income tax return; Business Activity Statement (BAS) quarterly/monthly for GST and PAYG.

vat_gst.title: Australian GST — 10% quarterly/monthly BAS
vat_gst.summary: 10% GST; quarterly or monthly BAS to ATO.

e_invoicing.title: PEPPOL mandatory for Commonwealth agencies by Dec 2026
e_invoicing.summary: All Commonwealth agencies must process Peppol e-invoices by Dec 2026; growing B2B PEPPOL voluntary adoption.

payroll.title: Single Touch Payroll Phase 2 + Superannuation 11.5%
payroll.summary: MEDIUM complexity: Superannuation 11.5% (rising to 12% Jul 2025); STP Phase 2 real-time reporting to ATO.

local_gaap.title: AASB standards (IFRS-aligned)
local_gaap.summary: AASB standards substantially aligned with IFRS; some local divergences.

banking_payments.title: Consumer Data Right (CDR) + NPP instant payments
banking_payments.summary: CDR open banking continues to expand to non-bank lenders/energy; New Payments Platform (NPP) for instant payments.
